title: My Building Regs Project Dashboard
purpose: A local, no-login dashboard that stores selected project type, saved tool results, generated packs and evidence reminders.
storage: localStorage at launch; optional account/email sync later

title: Save my answers
purpose: Let users save checker outputs and rerun them when the project scope changes.

title: Inspection timeline builder
purpose: Generate likely inspection stages based on project type, with printable stage cards.

title: Evidence vault light
purpose: A non-upload record keeper: filenames, certificate numbers, issuing body, received dates and notes. Avoid storing sensitive files at launch.

title: Certificate chaser
purpose: Prompt users to record whether competent person certificates, completion certificates and commissioning records have arrived.
storage: localStorage reminders with due dates; no external notifications at launch

title: Scope change prompt
purpose: When users return, ask whether the project changed. If yes, rerun route and Approved Document checks.

title: Planning-permission cross-check
purpose: Send relevant projects back to UKPlanningGuide for planning permission/lawful development questions without cannibalising this site.

title: Source re-check prompt
purpose: Surface a re-check warning when a saved project is older than 30, 60 or 90 days or involves Part L/F version-sensitive issues.
